tasks.description: Create Slack app and bot token
Create #claude-bridge and #sqtools-ops channels
Install Node.js and Claude Code CLI
Add ALLOWED_USER_IDS to .env
Create #bot-memory channel and add MEMORY_CHANNEL_ID to .env
Pull latest code: cd ~/jt-agent && git pull origin main && npm install && pm2 restart bridge-agent
Create #secretary-inbox Slack channel
Invite @bridge-agent to #secretary-inbox channel
Create Google Cloud service account for Calendar API
Share calendars with service account email
Add GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY path to .env
Add GOOGLE_CALENDAR_IDS to .env
Create Gmail API OAuth credentials (for email monitoring)
Add Gmail credentials to .env (GMAIL_CLIENT_ID, GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET, GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN)
Create #sqtools-alerts Slack channel
Invite @bridge-agent to #sqtools-alerts channel
Verify REPOS env var lists all repos to scan
Test security review: node security-review.js (manual run)
Create #store-inbox Slack channel
Invite @bridge-agent to #store-inbox channel
Create Square API credentials (read-only app)
Add SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN to .env
Design chat widget for JTPets.ca website
Create product catalog skill with nutrition data

_meta.description: Activation checklists for multi-agent system. Tasks marked completed:true are done. Priority: high, medium, low.
